endpoints.description: Search ThePaper news. Use headers Content-Type: application/json and Client-Type: 1. Body JSON has word, orderType, pageNum, pageSize, searchType. orderType=1 means newest first, orderType=3 relevance, searchType=1 news. contId maps to https://www.thepaper.cn/newsDetail_forward_{contId}. For latest climate-change news use word=气候变化, orderType=1, pageNum=1, pageSize=10, searchType=1.
strategy_notes: Use the POST search response to get contId candidates, then fetch only the top 1-3 detail pages when exact source/date/content is needed.
For recency tasks, set orderType=1 before deciding which contId to enrich.

endpoints.description: Fetch ThePaper article details for a contId. The HTML includes Next.js __NEXT_DATA__, and browser_api_call parses it to detailData.contentDetail with name, author, source, pubTime, publishTime, and nodeInfo. Use this instead of navigating detail pages when exact source/date is required.
strategy_notes: Use the parsed Next.js detail data as the authoritative source for source/date after search has identified the contId.
